tasks.dev: deno task --cwd engine dev & deno task --cwd web dev
tasks.start: ZEPHYR_CONFIG=../zephyr.toml deno task --cwd engine start & deno task --cwd web start
tasks.check:types:all: deno task --cwd web check:types && deno task --cwd engine check:types
tasks.format:projects: deno task --cwd engine format && deno task --cwd web format && deno task --cwd shared format
tasks.compile:engine: mkdir -p dist && deno compile --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read --allow-write --output dist/zephyr-engine engine/main.ts
tasks.compile:web: deno task build && mkdir -p dist && cd web && deno compile --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read=.env --include _fresh --include static --output ../dist/zephyr-web _fresh/compiled-entry.js
tasks.compile: deno task compile:engine && deno task compile:web
